heading: Definitions
label: 3701 Definitions

amendments: Amendments2004—Par. (1). substituted “Government Accountability Office” for “General Accounting Office”.Pub. L. 108–271

children.text: the term “agency” means an Executive agency, but does not include the Government Accountability Office; and

children.label: A
children.text: the assignment or loan of an employee of an agency to a private sector organization without a change of position from the agency that employs the individual, or

children.label: B
children.text: the assignment or loan of an employee of a private sector organization to an agency without a change of position from the private sector organization that employs the individual,
